About Me

Securing systems, protecting data, empowering organizations

Professional Profile

As a dedicated Cyber Security Consultant, I specialize in identifying vulnerabilities, implementing robust security measures, and ensuring compliance with industry standards. With expertise in threat analysis, penetration testing, and security architecture, I help organizations build resilient defenses against evolving cyber threats.

Security Assessment & Penetration Testing

Core Competency

Conducting comprehensive security audits, vulnerability assessments, and ethical hacking to identify weaknesses before malicious actors can exploit them. Experienced in network security, application security, and infrastructure hardening.

Incident Response & Forensics

Specialized Expertise

Rapid response to security incidents, threat containment, and digital forensics investigation. Skilled in malware analysis, log analysis, and developing incident response procedures to minimize damage and prevent future breaches.

Security Architecture & Compliance

Strategic Planning

Designing secure architectures, implementing security frameworks (ISO 27001, NIST, CIS), and ensuring regulatory compliance (GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS). Developing security policies and conducting security awareness training.
